accounts:
  groups: null
  users: null
dnf: {}
fips: {}
ignition: null
installer:
  anaconda: {}
  coreos: {}
kernel: {}
locale: {}
name: 'Blueprint example: disallowed properties for storage'
network:
  firewall: {}
openscap:
  profile_id: ""
registration:
  fdo:
    manufacturing_server_url: ""
  redhat:
    connector:
      enabled: false
    insights:
      enabled: false
    subscription_manager: {}
storage:
  minsize: 550 GiB
  partitions:
  - fs_type: ext4
    label: boot
    minsize: 800 MiB
    mountpoint: /boot
    type: plain
  - fs_type: ext4
    minsize: 50 GiB
    type: plain
  type: gpt
systemd: {}
timedate: {}
